economic_ownership_map.label: Net sales milestone ($3.7B threshold)

low.label: Net sales milestone payment if achieved in 2028 measurement period

source.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(i): $17.50 per CVR if Net Sales Milestone achieved during 2028 Measurement Period

low.label: Net sales milestone payment if achieved in 2028-29 measurement period only

source.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(ii): $8.75 per CVR if achieved during 2028-29 Measurement Period after missing 2028 period

low.label: Worldwide net sales threshold for net sales milestone

source.locator: Net Sales Milestone: aggregate worldwide Net Sales exceeds $3,700,000,000
Full year revenue totaled $1.032 billion for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022

low.label: Probability of exceeding $3.7B net sales in the 2028 measurement period
low.rationale: FY2022 revenue $1.0B; milestone requires ~3.6× run-rate by JNJ FY2028 Q1 window. JNJ MedTech distribution and Impella penetration partially offset but threshold remains ambitious.

low.label: Probability of reduced $8.75 payment in 2028-29 measurement period
low.rationale: Captures delayed four-quarter achievement at half rate if primary window missed.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 8.3125/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 8.3125, 'high': 17.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: 2028 Measurement Period through 2028-29 Measurement Period per CVR Agreement.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base P=40% full period; P=15% delayed; FY2022 revenue $1.032B vs $3.7B threshold.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No holder capital call; zero remaining capital on CVR claim.

economic_ownership_map.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

economic_ownership_map.label: FDA STEMI-without-shock approval milestone

source.locator: Milestone Payment (b): $7.50 per CVR for FDA Approval Milestone

low.label: Probability of FDA PMA approval for Impella in STEMI without cardiogenic shock by Jan 1, 2028
low.rationale: STEMI DTU trial and regulatory path remain active under JNJ; binary regulatory risk by fixed deadline.

low.label: Risk-adjusted FDA milestone value per CVR

source.locator: Milestone Payment (b): $7.50 per CVR for FDA Approval Milestone

base.label: Probability of FDA PMA approval for Impella in STEMI without cardiogenic shock by Jan 1, 2028
base.rationale: STEMI DTU trial and regulatory path remain active under JNJ; binary regulatory risk by fixed deadline.

source_lineage.locator: Milestone Payment (b): $7.50 per CVR for FDA Approval Milestone

economic_ownership_map.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 2.625/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 2.625, 'high': 7.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Payment within five business days of Milestone Notice; deadline Jan 1, 2028.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: STEMI DTU regulatory path under JNJ; binary by fixed deadline.

economic_ownership_map.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

economic_ownership_map.label: Class I clinical recommendation milestone

source.locator: Milestone Payment (c): $10.00 per CVR for Clinical Recommendation Milestone

low.label: Probability at least one Class I ACC/AHA guideline recommendation path succeeds by Dec 31, 2029
low.rationale: Three mutually exclusive clinical paths (STEMI, HRPCI, cardiogenic shock); earliest success triggers full payment.

low.label: Risk-adjusted clinical recommendation value per CVR

source.locator: Milestone Payment (c): $10.00 per CVR for Clinical Recommendation Milestone

base.label: Probability at least one Class I ACC/AHA guideline recommendation path succeeds by Dec 31, 2029
base.rationale: Three mutually exclusive clinical paths (STEMI, HRPCI, cardiogenic shock); earliest success triggers full payment.

base.label: Risk-adjusted clinical recommendation value per CVR

source.locator: Milestone Payment (c): $10.00 per CVR for Clinical Recommendation Milestone

high.label: Probability at least one Class I ACC/AHA guideline recommendation path succeeds by Dec 31, 2029
high.rationale: Three mutually exclusive clinical paths (STEMI, HRPCI, cardiogenic shock); earliest success triggers full payment.

high.label: Risk-adjusted clinical recommendation value per CVR

source_lineage.locator: Milestone Payment (c): $10.00 per CVR for Clinical Recommendation Milestone

economic_ownership_map.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 4.5/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 4.5, 'high': 10.0}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Clinical Recommendation Milestone Period ends Dec 31, 2029.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Three mutually exclusive ACC/AHA Class I paths; earliest triggers payment.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Base P=45% for any of three guideline paths.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
